payload.subject: Re: cannot export invoices for March
payload.body_text:
Hi,

Thanks for the report. The export endpoint was rate-limited above the documented threshold last week — we've raised it back to 50 req/min. Please retry the March export and let us know if it still fails.

If you need the data sooner, I can run the export on our side and email you the CSV directly.

Best,
Support

rationale: Customer's export issue maps to the documented rate-limit incident from 2026-04-22 (internal-postmortem-2026-04-22). The rate limit was reverted on 2026-04-23. Recommended action: confirm fix and offer manual export as fallback.
